dependencies.name: tomlplusplus
dependencies.reason: The display-free PD1 configuration module directly uses the system toml++ library for strict version-1 parsing; no supported minimum has been measured.

dependencies.name: nlohmann-json
dependencies.reason: The display-free PD1 theme parser directly includes the system nlohmann JSON header; the header-only dependency is compiled into the internal theme target and is not an installed runtime library.

dependencies.name: basu
dependencies.fallback: Ubuntu CI uses the API-compatible libsystemd sd-bus provider; one build links exactly one provider.
dependencies.reason: The Experimental settings service directly uses the system sd-bus API. Gentoo builds prefer and link basu; the provider boundary does not download, vendor, or link a second D-Bus client library.

dependencies.name: dbus
dependencies.reason: The Experimental service requires a user session message bus and its isolated tests use dbus-run-session and dbus-daemon. Project code links the selected sd-bus provider, not libdbus.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: PD1 targets X11 and assigns XSettings publication to settingsd; production linkage is not implemented or measured.

unresolved.reason: Record and review the complete prismdrake-settingsd dynamic closure after the Gentoo basu build; supported minimum provider and broker versions remain unmeasured.
